name: Simple Dot
short_description: Simple Dot is a minimalistic puzzle game, in which problems are solved with lines of various physical properties and the given surroundings.
detailed_description:
Simple Dot is a minimalistic puzzle game, in which problems are solved with lines of various physical properties and the given surroundings.

Features:

  • 5 different types of lines to solve problems with,
  • various environment mechanics
  • 70+ diverse levels,
  • multiple ways of solving each problem,
  • an amazing soundtrack created by Dawid Domagała,
  • steam achievements.
  • global rankings (optional – so no preasure),

Rules:

Objective:
  • guide the balls from one bucket to the other.
Your tools:
  • 5 lines with various physical properties.
Support:
  • delete unneeded lines,
  • repeat levels as many times you want e.g. once for achievements (stars) and once for points.
Rewards:
  • unlock Steam achievements and climb-up the global ranking with the points you gain!

    Simple Dot is a passion project. Created in my spare time, responsible for sleepless nights, and - in the end - dedicated to my two newborns that are the newest addition to my family.
